supersededBlockers.name: direct_postfix_tool_loop_retest
supersededBlockers.reason: Fresh retry produced a valid streamed LS tool input and a complete tool_result follow-up turn.

supersededBlockers.name: taskcreate_suppression_root_cause
supersededBlockers.reason: TaskCreate tasks[] is repaired to a single Claude Code TaskCreate input and is no longer suppressed in direct validation.

rootCause.symptom: Claude Code sessions could pause/interruption around tool loops after Kiro-Go suppressed TaskCreate and parallel Bash cancellation surfaced.
rootCause.cause: Kiro-Go suppressed model-emitted TaskCreate inputs shaped as tasks[] because Claude Code TaskCreate expects a single-task object; payload trimming also deprioritized taskCreate/taskUpdate/taskOutput.
rootCause.correction: For streamed tool_use, content_block_start.input is only a placeholder; final tool input must be reconstructed from input_json_delta.
rootCause.fix: Promote TaskCreate tasks[0] to subject/description/activeForm, synthesize missing description, repair common Claude Code filesystem/shell aliases, and prioritize task lifecycle tools during trimming.
